title: 15 FT FLAT STEEL COIL DRAIN CLEANER
features: VERSATILE: This versatile drain cleaner and unblocker has a flexible, flat 450cm (14.5ft) spring steel coil with a bulbous head and is ideal for unblocking sinks, small household pipes and urinals, etc
STORAGE HOLDER: The kit is supplied in a handy storage holder for safe storage
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Am-Tech offers a broad range of hand tools and with over one thousand product lines, offers a comprehensive range of products to the D.I.Says and professional user. The Am-Tech range of hand tools Includes D.I.Says tools, builders tools, automotive tools, measuring, safety wear, tool kits, padlocks, and much more. The entire Am-Tech hand tool range offers unrivaled branding incorporating stylish packaging design with a range of high quality tools. The Am-Tech range continues to grow and new lines are constantly being sourced to make the Am-Tech brand even stronger. Safety Warning Hazard: May cause skin and eye damage. In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately with water. Wash hands thoroughly in case of contact with skin. Inhalation can cause irritation of the respiratory tract. In case of fire, toxic fumes are created. Avoid contact with food and animals. If swallowed, consult a doctor immediately. In case of discomfort or discomfort after use, call a doctor or poison emergency call. Do not inhale. Do not eat or drink. Do not smoke. Do not place near open flames or hot surfaces. Wash hands after use. Do not dispose of container into the environment after use. Store container in a sealed container. Keep out of reach of children. Box Contains 1 x drain cleaner See more
